title: fix: close pdf buffer to prevent memory leak
description: Ensures the BytesIO buffer is closed and the canvas is deleted after report generation.
commit_messages: test: add memory leak regression test
diff:
diff --git a/src/reports/generator.py b/src/reports/generator.py
-    buffer = BytesIO()
-    canvas = Canvas(buffer)
+    try:
+        buffer = BytesIO()
+        canvas = Canvas(buffer)
+    finally:
+        buffer.close()
+        del canvas
